booflo.title: Find and observe a Booflo (passive End creature — Endergetic Expansion, found in Poise Forest)

puff_bug.title: Find and observe a Puff Bug (small End insect — Endergetic Expansion)

booflo_fur.title: Collect Booflo Fur from the Booflo

subtitle.text: The End is not empty. It has never been empty. We called it empty because nothing in it wanted to eat us.

description: The Booflo is a large passive creature native to the Poise Forest.
It does not attack. It grazes on End flora.
Booflo Fur drops on kill — soft, bioluminescent, used in end-tier crafting.
The Puff Bug is smaller — an insect-like creature found in the same biome.
It has wings and a faint glow.
Both creatures have been in this dimension since before the civilizations arrived.
This is the Dungeon Meshi principle in the End:
everything that lives here has adapted to the conditions.
The conditions are extreme. The creatures are not hostile.
The void selects for specific kinds of survival.
→ Find and observe the Puff Bug [check]
